data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. PARTY ANYTIME ran below best last time finishing fourth (20.12) over 366m at this track from Box 5. Should bounce back. 5. CASHED UP RHI is a talented type and proved too strong last time to win by a nose at this track in a handy 19.98 beating On The Whisper. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card in scoring last start. Leading chance again. 4. LOCHINVAR NUGGET boasts a consistent overall record including seven wins from 27 starts, the latest winning (19.88) over 366m at this track. Goes very well at the trip finding the frame in each of five starts. Super consistent and can feature with the right run. 2. PROFESSOR SAMSON should be thereabouts.","runners":[1,5,4,2],"exclusive":false}
